prompt: Abstract psychological illustration. A person drowning in a sea of monotonous documents and paperwork, feeling trapped while others look on without understanding. Melancholy but aesthetic, minimal shapes, muted blue and grey tones.

Abstract psychological illustration. A person wearing a bright smiling mask, but behind it, their true face is exhausted and crumbling. Surrounded by clothes racks. Emotional labor concept, stark contrast between bright surface colors and dark inner shadows.

Abstract psychological illustration. A person staring blankly at a glowing smartphone screen overflowing with endless identical profile cards. The feeling of romance turning into a mechanical job interview. Neon pink and cold blue lighting, dystopian romance concept.

Abstract psychological illustration. A person's head filled with chaotic, swirling storm clouds and lightning, representing the brain automatically simulating worst-case scenarios. Dark aesthetics with sharp yellow electric lines.

Abstract psychological illustration. A person absorbing dark, heavy auras from other people around them, unable to reject their emotions. Being too nice and acting as an emotional sponge. Soft pastel colors being overtaken by dark ink.

Abstract psychological illustration. A brain constructed like a radar dish or a protective shield, constantly scanning for danger. A positive reframe of negative thinking as a powerful defense mechanism. Highly structural, architectural mindscape, deep greens and greys.

Abstract psychological illustration. A person riding a violent emotional roller coaster that goes up to bright skies and plunges into dark abysses. Representing fluctuating motivation and mood swings. Dynamic angles, contrasting vibrant and dark colors.

Abstract psychological illustration. An older generation manager and a young fresh employee looking at each other, but the young employee's head is replaced by an alien spaceship or speaks in strange cryptic code blocks. Generational disconnect and different operating systems. Playful but serious corporate aesthetic.

Abstract psychological illustration. Once a blazing bright gear, now intentionally disconnected from the main corporate machinery, spinning idly in a low-power mode. A highly competent employee turning into a silent quitter due to systemic despair. Metallic textures, fading from bright gold to dull rust.

Abstract psychological illustration. Two people connected by a glowing, unbreakable toxic thread, caught in a beautiful but suffocating spiderweb. One person is crying but unable to let go of the other's hand. representing codependent romance and a systemic lock. Deep reds, purples, emotional and cinematic.
